remember: Students will be able to identify and locate different types of mineral and energy resources.
Students will be able to recall the distribution of mineral and energy resources in India and the world.
Students will be able to remember the importance of mineral and energy resources in the economy.
understand: Students will be able to explain the formation of minerals and energy resources.
Students will be able to describe the types and distribution of mineral and energy resources.
Students will be able to understand the role of mineral and energy resources in the development of a country.
apply: Students will be able to apply their knowledge of mineral and energy resources to real-life situations.
Students will be able to evaluate the impact of human activities on mineral and energy resources.
Students will be able to suggest ways to conserve mineral and energy resources.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the factors affecting the distribution of mineral and energy resources.
Students will be able to compare and contrast different types of mineral and energy resources.
Students will be able to assess the significance of mineral and energy resources in the context of sustainable development.

ncert_objectives: As per NCERT objective 1, to understand the importance of mineral and energy resources.
As per NCERT objective 2, to know the formation of minerals and energy resources.
As per NCERT objective 3, to identify and locate different types of mineral and energy resources.
board_exam_objectives: What CBSE tests from this chapter is the ability to identify and locate different types of mineral and energy resources on a map.
CBSE also tests the understanding of the formation, distribution, and conservation of mineral and energy resources.
The ability to analyze the significance of mineral and energy resources in the context of sustainable development is also assessed in the board exam.
